channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Chinese mining firm commended for boosting local development in Zimbabwe @XHNews
item.description: via Xinhua #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Xinhua

item.title: As Human-Wildlife Conflict Rises, Zimbabwean Communities Find New Ways to Coexist

item.title: January lithium export curbs loom over Zimbabwe mining conference
item.description: via Benchmark Mineral Intelligence #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Why Zimbabwe hosting CIMAM 2026 is a bigger deal than it looks @3menonaboat
item.description:
We present 5 reasons why CIMAM 2026 in Harare is not just "nice cultural news"

The post Why Zimbabwe hosting CIMAM 2026 is a bigger deal than it looks first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC move falls through as FC Hunters enter race
item.description: Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC transfer has collapsed, with FC Hunters now chasing the experienced striker as his next move unfolds. The post Knox Mtizwa’s Triangle FC move falls through as FC Hunters enter race appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Reserve Bank Of Zimbabwe Targets Banks Over Abusive Loan Practices And Debt Traps @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Banks On Notice As RBZ Targets The Lending Practices Affecting Thousands Of Zimbabweans The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has targeted banks and microfinance institutions over abusive loan practices and debt traps, warning that lenders which push already struggling borrowers dee via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Dr Trishula Patel launches “Becoming Zimbabwean: A History of Indians in Rhodesia” @3menonaboat
item.description:
The book was born of something more common than not in the land between two rivers than many would like to admit.

The post Dr Trishula Patel launches “Becoming Zimbabwean: A History of Indians in Rhodesia” first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

via Three Men On Boat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: SHOCK AS GIRL COLLAPSES, DIES, WHILE WALKING HOME WITH HER MOTHER @zimsituation
item.description: Source: SHOCK AS GIRL COLLAPSES, DIES, WHILE WALKING HOME WITH HER MOTHER – herald Lovemore Kadzura Mutare Bureau TRAGEDY struck a Headlands family when a girl, who was walking towards home with her mother and two siblings, collapsed and died on the spot. The incident happened on via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: India suffer double injury blow ahead of England, Zimbabwe tours @thezimbabwean
item.description: Key players sidelined: Harshit Rana and Varun Chakravarthy have been ruled out with hamstring injuries, impacting India’s ODI and T20I squads. Replacements named: Prince Yadav joins the ODI squad for England, while Ravi Bishnoi replaces Chakravarthy for the Zimbabwe T20Is. Busy s via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: Zulu king calls for orderly migration in Africa during Zimbabwe visit
item.description: via Daily Dispatch #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Daily Dispatch

item.title: AU backs Zimbabwe aviation growth
item.description: Tapiwe Chirume THE African Union (AU) has pledged to back Zimbabwe in liberalising regional skies to unlock trade, investment, and cross-border tourism.Speaking... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your cho via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: ZCTU General Council overturns Secretary General’s suspension, says NEC acted unconstitutionally
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Congress of Trade Unions (ZCTU) General Council (GC) on Monday overturned the suspension of Secretary General Tirivanhu Marimo, ruling that the National Executive Committee (NEC) acted outside its constitutional mandate. The Extraordinary General Council meeting was via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Heiress to Zimbabwean and South African-born billionaires turns $2 million Australian home into an $8.5 million sale
item.description: Business Insider Africa Beau Neilson sold her luxury Sydney warehouse home, The Pigeon Shed, for about $8.5 million, nearly quadrupling her 2012 purchase price. This sale follows Neilson’s recent A$20 million acquisition of a historic waterfront property in Double Bay, and her si via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mapfumo risks falling at the very last hurdle of an otherwise illustrious and heroic race @bulawayo24 @wicknellchivayo
item.description: The love of money has led to the demise of many.The decision by Thomas “Mukanya” Mapfumo to accept a staggering US$1 million performance contract funded by controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo h... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Stop abusive lending practices, banks told @HeraldZimbabwe @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Oliver Kazunga Senior Reporter THE Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe has moved to stop abusive lending practices, warning banks and microfinance institutions against trapping borrowers in unsustainable debt, seizing ATM cards... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
